title: Setting up your return policy | eBay
notes: Sellers can set preferences for automating returns, refunds, and replacements. Accessible through My eBay > Account > Site Preferences > Selling Preferences > Return preferences.

title: Seller Hub | Seller Center
notes: Brings all eBay selling tools together in one place - listings, orders, marketing, performance tracking. Free to use. Announced in 2015 Fall Seller Update.

title: Sales Reports Plus
notes: Free comprehensive view of sales numbers with downloadable reports. Shows sales by category, selling format, ending time, and unpaid item activity. Reports available for 2 years vs 6 months for standard reports.

title: eBay Stores: Track Your Sales
notes: Standard sales reporting accessible from Seller Hub Performance tab. Provides sales, selling costs, traffic, and buyer traffic source analytics.

title: eBay Stores: Track Your Sales
notes: Sales reporting available across multiple eBay marketplaces through Seller Hub.

title: Pricing and Discounts Terms and Conditions | eBay.com
notes: eBay invites sellers to offer coupons funded by them as promotional tools. eBay distributes promotional codes that can be redeemed for discounts, seller receives full price but is invoiced for the Seller Funded Amount.

title: Seller Performance Standards | eBay Seller Center
notes: Performance metrics including cases closed without seller resolution, transaction defect rate (max 2%), and late shipment rate (max 10%). Four regional standards programs based on delivery address.

title: Checkout | eBay
notes: Secure payment processing where payment data is never shared with seller. Supports credit/debit/gift cards, Apple Pay, Google Pay, PayPal, Venmo. Level 1 PCI DSS certified.

title: Saved searches | eBay
notes: Email alerts when new items matching saved search are listed. Appears in feed when signed in or via Saved on eBay homepage. Can toggle email notifications on/off.

title: Saved searches | eBay
notes: Follow favorite sellers using blue heart icon. Accessible through My eBay. Can filter Advanced search to show only items from saved sellers. Shows follower count metric.

title: Listing durations and timings | eBay
notes: Schedule listings to start up to 3 weeks in advance. Available in quick and advanced listing tools. Can view scheduled items in My eBay and download report in Seller Hub.

title: Listing durations and timings | eBay
notes: Scheduling capability available across multiple eBay marketplaces.

title: Listing durations and timings | eBay
notes: View of all listings scheduled for future start times. Accessible in My eBay with downloadable reports in Seller Hub.

title: Making a Second Chance Offer | eBay
notes: Allows non-winning bidders to purchase at their last bid price. Can make offers up to 60 days after auction ends. Free to make offer, final value fee if accepted.

title: Promoted Listings Standard | Seller Center
notes: Create new listing based on existing one. Inherits Promoted Listings settings if item was previously promoted. Supports bulk operations up to 500 listings.

title: Promoted Listings Standard | Seller Center
notes: Sell Similar functionality available across multiple eBay marketplaces.

title: Seller Clinics | Seller Center
notes: Free one-on-one support for business sellers with GMV under $100K/year. Three 45-minute sessions per calendar year with Marketplace Advisor for personalized growth advice.

title: eBay Sellers - The eBay Community
notes: Online forum for eBay sellers. Includes discussion boards for new sellers, seller groups, and topics on listing, pricing, policies, and shipping.

title: Seller Help | Seller Center
notes: Self-service resource for managing refunds, returns, INR/INAD cases, and common issues. Available on desktop and mobile. Can submit feedback removal requests and report policy violations.

title: Discounts Manager | eBay
notes: Create promotional discounts for selected items or categories for set time periods. Sale prices appear in search results. Managed through Seller Hub Marketing tab using Discounts Manager.

title: Discounts Manager | eBay
notes: Sale Events promotional tool available across multiple eBay marketplaces.

title: Promoted Listings Standard | Seller Center
notes: Metric showing percentage of promoted listings purchased after click. Calculated as Sold/Clicks. Available in Promoted Listings advertising dashboard.

title: Handling time | Seller Center
notes: Ship packages same day as payment received. Set custom order cut-off times per business day. Helps qualify for Top Rated Plus when combined with 30-day return policy.

title: Adding Best Offer to your listing and sending offers to buyers | eBay
notes: Review and respond to Best Offers from buyers. Sellers have 24 hours to accept, decline, or counteroffer. Each counteroffer expires after 96 hours.

title: Adding Best Offer to your listing and sending offers to buyers | eBay
notes: Manage multiple Best Offers. Counteroffers must be below Buy It Now price but above received offer. Maximum 4 counteroffers per negotiation.

title: Tax Information | Seller Center
notes: eBay automatically calculates, collects, and remits sales tax as Marketplace Facilitator in 46 jurisdictions. No seller action required. Tax rate based on ship-to address.

title: Tax Information | Seller Center
notes: Automatic tax collection for both US sales tax and international VAT transactions through marketplace facilitator obligations.

title: eBay: Seller Fees FAQs
notes: Metric indicating how often items sell on first listing. Referenced in context of choosing between auction-style and fixed-price formats.

title: Home | Seller Center
notes: Central hub for seller resources, tools, and information. US spelling 'Seller Center' is standard across eBay platforms.
